import sys
import argparse


def sync_users(users: list[dict]):
    for user in users:
        if user["status"] == "active":
            if user["tier"] == "premium":
                sync_premium_user(user)
            else:
                sync_basic_user(user)
        elif user["status"] == "suspended":
            handle_suspended(user)


def export_data(data: list[dict], format: str):
    writers = {"csv": write_csv, "json": write_json, "parquet": write_parquet}
    writer = writers.get(format)
    if not writer:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported format: {format}")
    writer(data)


def import_records(records: list[dict]):
    handlers = {"user": import_user, "order": import_order}
    for record in records:
        handler = handlers.get(record["type"], import_generic)
        handler(record)


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--mode", choices=["sync", "export", "import"])
    parser.add_argument("--format", default="json")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.mode == "sync":
        sync_users(fetch_all_users())
    elif args.mode == "export":
        export_data(load_export_data(), args.format)
    elif args.mode == "import":
        import_records(read_import_file())


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
